papers.title_zh: 潜在世界模型中可预测性的控制理论
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究潜在世界模型用于规划与控制时，常用的预测误差指标为何不能可靠反映最终控制效果。作者指出，规划器会访问训练分布之外、由候选动作到达的状态，因此基于数据分布平均的单步或多步预测误差无法决定控制性能。论文进一步提出以“规划器最终选择方案的预测代价与真实代价差异”作为更合理目标，并给出其与控制次优性的理论联系。
innovations: 指出世界模型评估中的结构性错位：训练/验证时的数据平均预测误差，与规划时实际访问的可达状态分布并不一致。
将目标重构为规划器承诺方案上的计划代价偏差，并证明规划次优性可由该偏差进行界定。
在线性控制前提下，将该偏差分解为流形内残差项与流形外发散项，明确后者才是影响控制效果的关键约束。
通过合成算子与潜在模型预测控制实验，验证验证误差与控制成功可能解耦，而面向规划器可达分布的保真度指标更有效。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于基于潜在世界模型进行规划、模型预测控制和序列决策的场景。论文主要解决“为什么预测更准不一定控制更好”的问题，为世界模型训练、选择和评估提供更贴近实际控制目标的理论依据。
papers.title_en: A Control Theory of Predictability in Latent World Models

papers.title: ABot-3DWorld 0: A Universal World Model to Explore Any 3D Space
papers.abstract: We present ABot-3DWorld 0, a universal multimodal 3D world model that turns text, image, and video inputs into high-fidelity, explorable 3D worlds. At the heart of our framework is a unified Spatial Generative Primitive (SGP), a compact tuple of a high-quality panorama and a spatial point cloud that delivers an efficient description of any 3D space. Multimodal inputs are first lifted into this primitive; a 3D-consistent panoramic video generator then explores the primitive along a planned trajectory; finally, our panoramic video reconstruction engine converts the generated video into a clean, photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) world. This pipeline covers two regimes: rich inputs (multi-view sets, casual video) are lifted into the SGP through a geometry-rigorous recovery that mirrors the observed scene, while a single image or sentence is completed generatively into a creative world. The result is one low-barrier engine for general 3D content creation that further anchors generated worlds to geographic points of interest, enabling map-native spatial exploration at consumer scale. Experiments show that ABot-3DWorld 0 sets the state of the art among open-source methods and demonstrates stronger scene fidelity than Marble under rich multimodal inputs.

papers.title_zh: ABot-3DWorld 0：一个可探索任意三维空间的通用世界模型
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 ABot-3DWorld 0，一种通用多模态 3D 世界模型，可将文本、图像和视频输入转化为高保真、可探索的三维世界。其核心是统一的空间生成原语，用全景图与点云的紧凑表示来描述任意 3D 空间。系统先将多模态输入提升到该原语，再生成三维一致的全景视频，并重建为可交互的 3D Gaussian Splatting 世界。
innovations: 提出统一的 Spatial Generative Primitive，以紧凑形式同时承载视觉外观与空间结构信息。
构建从文本/图像/视频到可探索 3D 世界的统一流水线，兼容丰富输入与稀疏输入两类生成模式。
将三维一致的全景视频生成与 3DGS 世界重建结合，形成从生成到可探索表示的完整闭环。
支持将生成世界锚定到地理兴趣点，从而面向地图原生的空间探索应用。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于 3D 内容生成、虚拟场景构建、地图式空间探索和多模态世界建模等场景。它解决的是如何以较低门槛把不同模态输入统一转成可浏览、可交互的三维空间表示。
papers.title_en: ABot-3DWorld 0: A Universal World Model to Explore Any 3D Space

papers.title: AeroMELD: A Linear Embedding of Aerosol Populations for Diagnostics and Latent Dynamics
papers.abstract: Accurately representing atmospheric aerosol populations is essential for simulating aerosol-cloud interactions, radiative forcing, and ice nucleation, yet existing reduced schemes impose structural assumptions that limit their ability to capture composition diversity and mixing state. Machine-learning approaches offer more flexible representations, but standard autoencoders do not preserve the mathematical structure of aerosol populations and therefore cannot support physically meaningful process operators. We introduce AeroMELD (Aerosol Measure Embedding for Latent Dynamics), a mathematically grounded framework for constructing low-dimensional latent variables that retain this structure. We show that any permutation-invariant linear encoder must take a scale-shape decomposition, with total number concentration represented explicitly and latent shape given by a barycentric combination of per-particle embeddings. This aggregated latent state retains the diagnostic expressiveness of a Deep Sets model by moving the nonlinear post-aggregation stage into the learned diagnostic map while preserving latent linearity. Using particle-resolved data as ground truth, we encode weighted particle populations directly rather than binned aerosol states; size-resolved mass and number distributions serve only as diagnostic targets and visual summaries. The latent space accurately reconstructs these distributions, CCN spectra, optical coefficients, and immersion-freezing behavior while preserving the linear population structure needed for hybrid ML-physics models. Although the experiments focus on diagnostic reconstruction, the embedding is designed so that emissions and mixing can be represented exactly and nonlinear microphysical processes learned in a controlled latent space. This work establishes a foundation for learning aerosol-process evolution directly in latent space.

papers.title_zh: AeroMELD：用于诊断与潜在动力学的气溶胶群体线性嵌入
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 AeroMELD，一个面向大气气溶胶群体的低维潜变量构建框架，目标是在降维的同时保留群体表示的数学结构。作者认为传统自编码器虽可压缩表示，但难以支持具有物理意义的过程算子。为此，论文设计了满足置换不变性与线性结构的编码方式，使潜在空间既能支持诊断重建，也适合后续与物理过程模型结合。
innovations: 提出具有数学约束的气溶胶群体潜在表示，强调在低维空间中保留线性人口结构。
证明任意满足置换不变性的线性编码器都应采用“规模-形状”分解形式。
以显式浓度项加粒子嵌入重心组合的方式构建聚合潜变量，在保留线性的同时保持较强诊断表达能力。
为后续在潜在空间中学习排放、混合及微物理过程演化提供了结构化基础。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于气溶胶-云相互作用、辐射强迫、冰核形成等大气科学建模场景。它主要解决高维粒子群体难以压缩且压缩后又难以保持物理可操作性的表示问题，适合 ML 与物理混合建模。
papers.title_en: AeroMELD: A Linear Embedding of Aerosol Populations for Diagnostics and Latent Dynamics

papers.title: Cycle-World: Mitigating Error Accumulation in Long-term Video World Models via Reverse-Prediction Cycle Consistency
papers.abstract: Autoregressive diffusion models have enabled high-quality video generation, yet their sequential nature inherently suffers from error accumulation. In long-horizon video synthesis, minor prediction deviations compound over time, inevitably leading to unconstrained generative drift, structural collapse, and severe visual degradation. To address this, we propose Cycle-World, a novel framework designed for stable and temporally consistent long-video generation. Our approach tackles error drift by enforcing strict temporal reversibility across both the training and inference phases. Theoretically, we demonstrate that forward generative drift can be strictly bottlenecked by a cycle-consistency objective. During training, we integrate an efficient reverse-prediction model to implicitly embed causal constraints into the forward generator, compelling it to produce reversible sequences that tightly adhere to the natural video manifold. At inference time, we repurpose this frozen reverse model as a runtime corrector. Through gradient-based cycle guidance, it iteratively refines the generated latent representations, actively suppressing accumulated errors before they are committed to the historical context. Extensive experiments on the VBench benchmark demonstrate that Cycle-World's dual-phase synergy significantly mitigates error drift, achieving state-of-the-art overall generation quality and long-horizon temporal consistency in 60-second synthesis.

papers.title_zh: Cycle-World：通过反向预测循环一致性缓解长时程视频世界模型中的误差累积
papers.summary_cn: 该论文关注长时程视频世界模型中的误差累积问题，即自回归生成过程中微小偏差会不断放大，最终导致画面漂移和结构崩坏。作者提出 Cycle-World，在训练与推理两个阶段同时利用反向预测来约束时间可逆性。训练时通过循环一致性将因果约束注入前向生成器，推理时则使用冻结的反向模型作为纠错器，持续修正潜在表示中的累积误差。
innovations: 提出面向长视频生成的 Cycle-World 框架，以反向预测循环一致性抑制误差漂移。
从理论上说明前向生成漂移可由循环一致性目标进行约束。
在训练阶段引入高效反向预测模型，将时间可逆性与因果约束嵌入前向生成过程。
在推理阶段复用冻结的反向模型，通过基于梯度的 cycle guidance 进行在线纠错。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于长时程视频生成、视频世界模型和需要稳定时间一致性的生成任务。它主要解决自回归视频生成在长序列下容易发生误差累积、内容漂移和视觉退化的问题。
papers.title_en: Cycle-World: Mitigating Error Accumulation in Long-term Video World Models via Reverse-Prediction Cycle Consistency

papers.title: Beyond Semantic IDs: Encoding Business-Value Ranking into Document Identifiers for Generative Retrieval
papers.abstract: Generative Retrieval (GR) formulates retrieval as a sequence-to-sequence generation task, assigning each document a document identifier (DocID) and retrieving it through autoregressive decoding, making DocID design a critical factor in retrieval quality. However, existing schemes based on discrete representation learning suffer from inherent collision issues and create a mismatch between the DocID's encoding objective and the system's business optimization target. To address these limitations, we propose Cluster-Ranked Identifier (CRID), which decouples DocID into semantic clustering and business-value ranking, yielding collision-free identifiers that support incremental updates via intra-cluster reranking. We further introduce an analytical framework that decomposes retrieval gains into personalized preference and statistical prior generalization, revealing how semantic cluster size governs the balance between the two components. Experiments on a 300M-item Taobao e-commerce corpus show that CRID surpasses the strongest embedding-based retrieval baseline on top-K Hitrate, and delivers +1.06% GMV in full-traffic deployment.

papers.title_zh: 超越语义ID：将商业价值排序编码进生成式检索的文档标识符
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究生成式检索中的文档标识符设计问题，指出现有基于离散表示学习的 DocID 方案存在碰撞问题，并且其编码目标与业务优化目标不一致。作者提出 Cluster-Ranked Identifier（CRID），把 DocID 拆分为语义聚类与商业价值排序两部分，以支持无碰撞标识和增量更新。论文还给出一个分析框架，用于解释检索增益中个性化偏好与统计先验泛化两部分的来源。
innovations: 提出 CRID 标识符方案，将文档标识分解为语义聚类和商业价值排序两个组成部分
通过这种解耦设计实现无碰撞 DocID，并支持簇内重排式的增量更新
提出一个分析框架，将检索收益分解为个性化偏好建模与统计先验泛化两部分
从理论上讨论语义簇大小如何影响个性化能力与泛化能力之间的平衡
papers.scenario_cn: 面向生成式检索系统，尤其适用于电商搜索、推荐检索等既要求语义相关性又要求兼顾业务价值排序的场景。它主要解决现有 DocID 设计在标识冲突、业务目标错位和动态更新方面的不足。
papers.title_en: Beyond Semantic IDs: Encoding Business-Value Ranking into Document Identifiers for Generative Retrieval
